detected_defects.symptom: Autoplay does not work for subsequent activities.
detected_defects.affected_activities: All activities after the first one.
detected_defects.root_cause: Autoplay effect in ActivityPlayerClient was bound to activity.promptAudioKey which was missing in later activities, and did not trigger correctly on screen transitions.

detected_defects.symptom: Speaker buttons and option clicks do not play audio in later activities.
detected_defects.affected_activities: All Matching, Ordering, Checklist, and later Choice activities.
detected_defects.root_cause: Renderers were hardcoded to look for option.narrationKey which was undefined for later activities. No fallback or contract resolver was used at runtime.

detected_defects.symptom: Spoken feedback does not play; only SFX plays.
detected_defects.root_cause: ActivityPlayerClient only played the SFX from the evaluation result and did not sequence or trigger the spoken feedback WAV.
